curation_notes: Re-curated with improved hints. Patch modifies only src/unlock_notify.rs (1 file). The fix changes fired() and wait() from &mut self to &self, holds the mutex guard while calling notify_one(), and changes the callback to use shared references instead of creating aliased &mut from raw pointers. L3 hints now properly differentiate from L1/L2 by naming the shared-cache lock notification subsystem. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern. Vulnerability class race-condition confirmed from CWE-362 and patch analysis.
